name: Osage Legend Crips, Legend Crips
description: Legend Crips is a predominately Black gang in the City of Inglewood based off Osage Avenue. They are located between Praire Avenue (east) to La Brea (west) from Manchester Blvd (north) to about 97th Street (south).
